Introduction to Terry County

Arrows in Terry County

Arrow #3: Brownfield

More Details for Arrow #3

Location: South side of Brownfield Chamber of Commerce an Vistor Center

Address: 221 Lubbock Road | Brownfield, Texas

Coordinates: 33.1759548, -102.2691735

Installed: August 24, 2011

Marker Text:

Circa 1900, Quanah Parker received calves from the Brownfields to stock herds and feed his tribe

Get Directions via Google Maps

Texas Plains Trail Region Map

Click a county to view arrows

Welcome to the Quanah Parker Trail!

Explore the historical arrow markers commemorating Quanah Parker and the Comanche people across the Texas Plains Trail Region. Use the map on the homepage or navigate via the menu to learn more about this effort.
